examples.text: فَأَمَّا الَّذِينَ شَقُوا فَفِي النَّارِ لَهُمْ فِيهَا زَفِيرٌ وَشَهِيقٌ
examples.english: As for those who are torn in the fire, they will have sighs and inhales in it.

examples.text: إِذَا أُلْقُوا فِيهَا سَمِعُوا لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِيَ تَفُورُ
examples.english: If they were thrown into it, they heard it gasping as it boiled up.
